Class ModerationResult

java.lang.Object
org.springframework.ai.moderation.ModerationResult
public final class ModerationResult extends Object
Represents the result of a moderation process, indicating whether content was flagged, the categories of moderation, and detailed scores for each category. This class is designed to be constructed via its Builder inner class.
Since:
1.0.0
Author:
Ahmed Yousri
